<?php namespace Spatie\Ray\Payloads; class CustomPayload extends Payload { /** @var string */ protected $content; /** @var string */ protected $label; public function __construct(string $content, string $label = '') { $this->content = $content; $this->label = $label; } public function getType(): string { return 'custom'; } public function getContent(): array { return [ 'content' => $this->content, 'label' => $this->label, ]; } }
